codeReview.summary: The foundation scaffold implementation in commit 1157cdb covers the requested setup: Next.js 15 App Router + strict TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4 tokens and dark variables, Drizzle schema/migration, SQLite singleton with WAL, cn() utility, Vitest/ESLint/Prettier config, next-themes root provider, and a comprehensive seed script. I found one non-blocking test reliability issue.

issues.description: The DB tests are stateful and depend on a pre-migrated, pre-seeded local file (`./data/blog.db`). In a clean checkout (or after deleting DB files, which are gitignored), these assertions fail with missing tables/data unless migration+seed are run first. Consider creating/tearing down an isolated test DB in setup (or running migration+seed in test setup) so `vitest` is self-contained.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill procedure appears too rigid for scaffolding features: it requires strict red-phase TDD and mandatory agent-browser verification for all tasks, while this feature was primarily infra/setup and was validated via CLI commands and curl.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:24 (strict TDD) and :40-45 (mandatory agent-browser); handoff verification used `PORT=3100 npx next dev (background) + curl http://localhost:3100` instead (.factory/missions/1eaa9d83-1e54-4588-bb57-26ce9ede79db/handoffs/2026-03-29T15-04-12-055Z__foundation-scaffold__14d1073d-1335-4ac9-b99a-18b7ebd25ddb.json:46-49), and handoff skill feedback explicitly calls out TDD impracticality for scaffold work (:106-107).

sharedStateObservations.observation: A useful dependency compatibility constraint (Node 18 environment requires pinning Tailwind to 4.0.x instead of 4.1+) was discovered in this feature but is not yet captured in shared environment knowledge.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff discovered issue documents the Node/Tailwind constraint (.factory/missions/1eaa9d83-1e54-4588-bb57-26ce9ede79db/handoffs/2026-03-29T15-04-12-055Z__foundation-scaffold__14d1073d-1335-4ac9-b99a-18b7ebd25ddb.json:95-99); package is pinned to Tailwind 4.0.17 (package.json:30,43); .factory/library/environment.md dependency notes currently mention better-sqlite3 and shiki but not Tailwind/Node compatibility (:34-37).

summary: Reviewed foundation-scaffold (worker session 14d1073d-1335-4ac9-b99a-18b7ebd25ddb, commit 1157cdb). Result is PASS: requested scaffold capabilities are present and consistent with the feature description/expected behavior, with one non-blocking test isolation concern and two shared-state observations (skill procedure fit and environment knowledge capture).
